title: Kilner Hexagonal Glass Twist Top Preserve Storage Jar 250 ml
features: STORE SAUCES The Kilner 250 Millilitre Hexagonal Twist Top Bottle is the perfect solution for storing and serving all your homemade salad dressings, ketchup, sauces, and herb-infused oils
KEEP THINGS FRESH The gingham printed one-piece lid system assures an airtight seal that keeps contents fresher for longer
REUSE, REFILL, RECYCLE Made in England using 30 percent recycled glass from kerbside collection services, these sustainable jars are reusable time and time again

NATURAL MATERIALS Made from high-quality BPA-free soda-lime glass, this bottle does not absorb odours, flavours, or stains. Not only is glass a healthier option, but it is also made to last and never for single use
THE KILNER STORY invented by John Kilner and Co. in England, The original Kilner Jar is as much loved and successful now as it was over 180 years ago

specifications_table.Product care instructions: ‎Dishwasher Safe, Do not pour boiling water directly into your jars/bottles, Wash before first use
